title: Return Policy
content: Most returnable products can be returned within their configured return window if unused, undamaged by the customer, and sent back with original packaging.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are approved after order verification, eligibility checks, and risk review. High-risk refund requests may require evidence or human review.

title: Damaged Item Policy
content: Customers reporting damaged items should provide clear photo or video proof before refund approval. Replacement or store credit may be offered after review.

title: Exchange Policy
content: Size and fit issues should prioritize exchange when stock is available. Exchanges are preferred over refunds for low-risk eligible returns.

title: Sale Item Policy
content: Sale items are generally not refundable unless they arrive damaged or the wrong item was delivered.
